subject: feat(design): adopt circle pin as app icon, regenerate all PNGs
body:
Replace the fuel gauge icon with a green circle map pin on abyss dark
teal background. Immediately recognizable as a location marker.

- Replaced assets/icon-source.svg with circle pin design
- Regenerated all 6 icon PNGs via scripts/generate-icons.mjs (400 DPI)
- Updated app.json splash + adaptive icon backgroundColor to #0D3B40
- Copied PWA icons to public/assets/images/
- Deleted all draft icon files (fuel-pump v1-v3, pin v1-v2)
